description_long: This is a double-sink bathroom vanity with a large rectangular mirror mounted above it. The vanity features a dark wood finish with a white countertop, housing two oval sinks with chrome faucets. Below the countertop, there are three central drawers flanked by two cabinet doors on each side, all equipped with metallic handles. The mirror is framed in the same dark wood as the vanity, creating a cohesive and elegant appearance. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for upscale urban bathrooms or public restroom facilities. The materials and construction suggest durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A modern double-sink bathroom vanity with a dark wood base, white countertop, and a large matching framed mirror above. Features include chrome faucets, drawers, and cabinet doors with metallic handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double sinks, chrome faucets, three central drawers, two cabinet doors, and the large framed mirror above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the vanity, the thickness of the countertop, and the profile of the mirror frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back of both the vanity and the mirror, with no visible hardware or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side profile of the vanity, the handles on the cabinet doors, and the mirror's edge.
